meta.title: Salón Lumi · premium hair salon in Prague
meta.description: A premium hair salon in central Prague. Cuts, colour and balayage with a team that listens. Book online — first consultation is free.

hero.sub: Hairstylists who actually listen. Honest advice and a colour or cut that fits both your hair and your everyday life.

about.label: About the salon
about.title: A small Prague salon where the focus is on you, your hair and the result
about.p1: In central Prague since 2018. The team hardly changes, the salon stays small on purpose — your stylist always has time to listen.
about.p2: We specialise in long hair and colour that grows out beautifully — balayage, foliage and soft highlights. No harsh bleach, no monthly fixes.

services.label: Services
services.title: Hair care that fits your life
services.lead: A short overview of what we do — pick what speaks to you. The first consultation is always free, with no obligation.

s1.title: Cuts tailored to you
s1.desc: A cut shaped around your face, hair type and the way you actually wear it. Always starts with a short conversation about what you want.

s2.title: Colour and toning
s2.desc: A shade chosen to look natural, elegant and harmonic — never overdone. Ammonia-free options available on request.

s3.title: Balayage and lightening
s3.desc: Hand-painted highlights that add depth and a little lightness — without harsh contrasts and without high-maintenance roots.

s4.title: Care and regeneration
s4.desc: Olaplex, hair botox and bonding treatments. Premium care that we'll only recommend when your hair really needs it.

quote.text: We know how much your hair matters. That's why every visit starts with a real conversation, never with a sales pitch — and we always show you the colour in daylight before we begin.

team.label: The team
team.title: Behind every visit, experienced hands
team.lead: A small team that's been together for years. Each of us specialises in something different — pick whoever's work feels closest to yours.

lookbook.label: Lookbook
lookbook.title: A few recent transformations
lookbook.lead: A small selection of cuts and colour transformations from the past few months.

t1.quote: After my first visit I just kept coming back, and I've been a regular for three years now. I trust Ema with my hair more than anyone else in this city.
t1.name: Dominika

t2.quote: The best balayage in Prague. You can see they really know what they're doing — and they never push me into more expensive services.
t2.name: Zuzana

t3.quote: Lovely interior, good coffee, professional team. I recommend them to all my friends — and for long hair they're the best in the city.
t3.name: Veronika

t4.quote: Lucia gave me a darker shade for winter, and we moved to a soft balayage for the summer. It still looks completely natural — thank you!
t4.name: Petra

t5.quote: I originally came in just for a cut. Today my whole family goes there — including my daughter.
t5.name: Andrea

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Common questions
faq.q1: How far in advance should I book?
faq.a1: About a week ahead for a cut and two weeks for colour. Around Christmas and just before summer, plan three weeks ahead.
faq.q2: Do you offer a consultation before the first visit?
faq.a2: Yes — fifteen minutes, free of charge, by email or phone. Just send us a few photos of your hair and we'll let you know whether what you want is realistic.
faq.a3: Blue zone right outside the salon, or in the OC Flora paid car park, a 5-minute walk away.
faq.a4: Yes — card, cash, Apple Pay and Google Pay.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Open today until 19:00
contact.lead: Online booking is open 24/7. By phone, you can reach us during opening hours.

cookies.text: We use cookies to give you a better experience.

svc_pg.meta_title: Services and price list · Salón Lumi
svc_pg.meta_desc: Our complete service menu and price list — cuts, colour, balayage, care and bridal styling. Always with a free consultation.
svc_pg.title: Our complete price list
svc_pg.lead: Every appointment starts with a short, free consultation. The prices below are starting points; we'll always agree the final price before we begin.

cuts.title: Cuts tailored to you
cuts.desc: A cut shaped to your face, hair density and the way you really wear it. We finish with a short styling lesson so the look survives the next morning at home.

r1.name: Women's tailored cut
r1.desc: Wash, signature cut and finish styling. Includes a consultation and a simple post-cut care plan.

r2.name: Long-hair cut & shape
r2.desc: A specialised approach for hair past the shoulders — soft layering, ends repaired and length preserved.

r3.name: Fringe trim
r3.desc: A maintenance trim between full cuts — book within 6 weeks of your last visit.

r4.name: Men's cut & beard
r4.desc: Scissor or clipper cut with a hot-towel finish. Beard trim available as an add-on.

col.title: Colour and toning
col.desc: We work with Wella, Olaplex and ammonia-free systems. We always patch-test new clients and show you the colour swatch in your own daylight before we begin.

r1.name: Roots refresh
r1.desc: Maintenance colour at the roots, blended into your existing tone. Best 6–8 weeks after your last visit.

r2.name: Full single-tone colour
r2.desc: From roots to ends in a single chosen tone. Includes a glaze finish for shine.

r3.name: Glaze / gloss
r3.desc: A 20-minute treatment to refresh tone and shine — perfect between full colours.

r4.name: Grey blending
r4.desc: A soft, low-maintenance way to blend in greys so they grow out gracefully — without a hard line at the roots.

bal.title: Soft balayage and lightening
bal.desc: Our signature service. Hand-painted, never harsh and always supported by Olaplex. The final price depends on length and density — we'll confirm it at the consultation.

r1.name: Partial balayage
r1.desc: Lighter pieces around the face and parting. Ideal for first-timers or for a low-maintenance refresh.

r2.name: Full-head balayage
r2.desc: Hand-painted lightening across the whole canopy, finished with a tonal glaze for depth.

r3.name: Foilyage / dimensional
r3.desc: Balayage with foil-pressed accents for a brighter result while keeping the roots soft.

r4.name: Colour correction
r4.desc: For clients fixing a previous service. Always preceded by a paid 30-minute strand-test consultation a week before.

care.title: Repair and regeneration
care.desc: In-salon treatments and at-home programmes. We'll only recommend a treatment if your hair actually needs it — we'd rather you came in less often than spent more than you should.

r1.name: Olaplex treatment
r1.desc: A targeted bond-rebuilder for hair stressed by colour, heat or extensions. We recommend it every 4–6 weeks.

r2.name: K18 deep mask
r2.desc: A 4-minute peptide mask that rebuilds keratin chains. Best paired with colour services.

r3.name: Scalp ritual
r3.desc: A massage-led scalp cleanse — exfoliation, oil dissolve and a 12-minute pressure-point release.

r4.name: Bridal trial + wedding day
r4.desc: A pre-wedding trial run plus styling on the day. Includes a moodboard call and travel within Prague 1–10.

add.title: Common add-ons
add.lead: Add to any service when you book. We'll only suggest what your hair actually needs.

vou.title: Salon vouchers, printed by hand
vou.text: A voucher for any service or for an open amount (from 30 €). Hand-pressed on cotton card, ready in two working days. Valid 12 months.

team_pg.meta_desc: Meet the Lumi stylists — eight years of practice, four BOMTON CUP nominations and a clear focus on long hair, balayage and bridal.
team_pg.title: Five stylists, one salon
team_pg.lead: A small, deliberately quiet team. Each of us specialises in something different — pick the stylist whose work speaks to you, or let us match you at the consultation.

s1.name: Ema Nováková
s1.b1: Ema founded Lumi in 2018 after seven years between Berlin and Prague. Wella Master Colour Expert, three-time BOMTON CUP finalist. Her chair specialises in long, layered hair.
s1.b2: Always a 15-minute consultation before a first colour. Never more than two levels lifted in one session. Clients come back every six weeks or so.

s2.name: Lucia Veselá
s2.b1: Our resident colourist since 2020. Trained under Goldwell in Vienna. Runs the salon's correction work — long sessions, always with a strand-test the week before.
s2.b2: Her speciality is grey integration — out of the monthly root cycle, into a tone that grows out gracefully. If you're tired of constant maintenance, this is her chair.

s3.name: Hana Krajčová
s3.b1: Joined Lumi in 2021 after four seasons styling for Czech Vogue and the opening team at Augustine. Spring–autumn weddings; winter editorials.
s3.b2: Always a trial — never a day-of surprise. Travels for ceremonies across Czechia and Slovakia. A moodboard call is included in every wedding fee.

s4.name: Klára Dušková
s4.b1: Finished her apprenticeship at Lumi in 2024 and now runs her own chair. Trained alongside Ema for two years; Olaplex Level 2.
s4.b2: Booking with Klára is 20% below senior rates — we want her to grow with clients who genuinely like her style.

ba.label: Before · After
ba.title: A few recent transformations
ba.lead: Six clients who let us share their photos. The look on the right is always how their hair looked at the end of the appointment — never re-styled at home for the photo.

b1.title: From box-dye to a low-maintenance soft balayage
b1.note: Three sessions, eight weeks apart. Olaplex on every visit and no foils above level 7.

b2.title: Length preserved, weight removed and the ends rebuilt
b2.note: A single visit. We took two centimetres off the length and 20% of the weight from the mid-lengths.

b3.title: Out of monthly root touch-ups, into a soft natural blend
b3.note: Two visits, six months apart. We stretched the regrowth and pulled cool tones through the mid-lengths.

b4.title: A loose, romantic updo for a Český Krumlov wedding
b4.note: Trial on the Tuesday, the real day on the Saturday. The bride asked for nothing pinned at the temples.

b5.title: From a brassy lift back to a clean, even, cool blonde
b5.note: A four-hour correction with a strand-test the week before. Glaze refresh four weeks later.

b6.title: A first proper cut in two years — soft layers and a fresh fringe
b6.note: Ninety minutes, no colour. We dry-cut the layers after the wash to read the natural fall of the hair.

book_pg.meta_desc: Pick a service, a stylist and a time — confirmed in writing within four working hours. A free 15-minute consultation is always included.
book_pg.title: Book your visit
book_pg.lead: Four short steps. We'll confirm in writing within four working hours, and a free 15-minute consultation is always included before any colour service.

s1.title: What can we do for you?
s1.lead: Pick the closest match — we'll fine-tune at the consultation. The long-hair surcharge applies if your hair is longer than mid-back.

o2.name: Long-hair cut & shape
o2.meta: 90 min · for hair past the shoulder

s2.title: Pick your stylist
s2.lead: Or let us match you — we'll suggest the right person based on the service, your hair length and who has space the week you want.

s3.title: Pick a date and time
s3.lead: A live view of openings for the next ten working days. Saturday afternoons usually fill up first — book three weeks ahead in spring and December.

s4.title: A few final details
s4.lead: We'll text you a confirmation within four working hours. Free cancellation up to twenty-four hours before your visit.

f.notes_ph: Photo of recent colour / sensitivities / preferred stylist…
